description: Locale-independent clinical-rule invariants. Every rule statement listed here must be asserted by all five locale drafts of the referenced routes, so a rule fix can never land in a subset of locales again. Patterns are JavaScript regular expressions matched against the raw draft markdown.

invariants.description: White space S attaches to a basic location (WS, DS, DdS) and is never a complete stand-alone response location. RIAP v5 sequences print WS/DS/DdS only.

en: not a stand-alone basic location code
pt: não é um código básico independente

invariants.description: Bare M / FM / m are Structural Summary family labels. An individual response requires the active/passive suffix (Xa, Xp, Xa-p).

en: is not a complete response code
ja: 完全な入力コードとして使用しません

invariants.description: One movement code per family per response. Active and passive codes from the same family are never entered as separate determinants.

es: no se introducen en casillas separadas
pt: não são inseridos em campos separados

invariants.description: When separate objects in one family show active and passive movement, the a-p code is entered once. One object showing both is not automatically a-p.

es: una vez, en lugar de introducir
pt: uma vez, em vez de inserir

invariants.description: A blank FQ field is unfinished input, not the FQnone category. FQnone must be selected explicitly.
